title: Cast Iron Padlock Cylindrical pin Lock 50 mm with 3 Keys Hard Stainless Steel Suitable for Home Indoor Outdoor Locks for Ladders Pack 2
features: This high-security padlock with 3 keys is designed to increase the security in your space and prevent anyone from breaking the lock.
The hardened steel brass shackle padlock is difficult to cut and twist, making it very difficult for pickers to unlock.
The cast iron body and a stainless steel shackle are weatherproof. This padlock with key survived all destructive tests and is not easily broken.
You can use the lock for your garage, gate, shed, fence, bike, door, toolbox, gym locker, etc.
Each padlock come with 3 keys to make sure you have a spare key for friends and family to use if required
description: 50mm Cast Iron Padlock with 3 Keys About This Product Secure your valuables with this high-quality 50mm Cast Iron Padlock , featuring a cylindrical pin lock and durable stainless steel shackle. Ideal for both indoor and outdoor use, including securing ladders, gates, lockers, and more. Key Features: Premium Material: Solid cast iron body ensures long-lasting durability and resistance to wear. High Security: Cylindrical pin mechanism provides increased safety and protection. Stainless Steel Shackle: Hardened and strong, it resists cutting, twisting, and tampering. Rust Resistant: Suitable for indoor and sheltered outdoor environments. Size: 50mm padlock with an automatic locking mechanism for convenience. Versatile Use: Ideal for home, garages, gates, toolboxes, lockers, fences, and ladders. Includes: 3 matching keys Specifications: Material: Solid Cast Iron Shackle: Hardened Stainless Steel Lock Type: Cylindrical Pin Lock Mechanism: Automatic Locking Includes: 3 Keys Size: 50mm
